content.en:
At the same time, a large number of half-step True Ancestors were impacting the True Ancestor Realm, only to see countless breaths penetrating through the void, causing the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm to produce one wonder after another.

Everyone is seizing the time to impact the True Ancestor level and fight for this opportunity.

And not long after Ye Tian hit the True Ancestor realm, he realized that he couldn't become the first True Ancestor.

Without him, just because he has accumulated too deeply, this is a good thing, but if he wants to complete the transformation of the half-step True Ancestor and True Ancestor levels, and completely step into the Great Dao realm, it will undoubtedly take longer, so there is no way to become the first True Ancestor.

However, he didn't care anymore.

Just when everyone was impacting the True Ancestor Realm, countless True Ancestors in the chaos tore through the barriers of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and descended on the Xuanxu Ancient Realm one after another.

At the same time, there were many visions everywhere in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

One after another fragments of ruins were born, and among these ruins, there was a true ancestor aura, and some of them had an extremely terrifying aura, as if it was much stronger than many true ancestors.

However, in terms of numbers, these True Ancestors still couldn't compare to the True Ancestors in the Chaos.

After all, the fragments of the domain realm passed through the dark forbidden domain, and I don't know how many strong people fell, plus the battle of the domain realm, the true ancestor didn't know how many people died in battle, so it was naturally impossible for the remaining true ancestors to be too many.

Ye Tian, no matter how weak their realm is, it is only at the Dao Ancestor level that it is much less, and the number of True Ancestors will not be lacking.

These ruins were born, but no one dared to enter, after all, the aura of those True Ancestors in the ruins was not concealed at all, it was just to warn them.

But in the end, a true ancestor broke into the ruins.

A top True Ancestor at the peak of the Great Dao had broken into a small ruin that only had one True Ancestor's aura leaking out, and in his opinion, his own strength was enough to wipe out this ruin.

However, as soon as he entered this ruin, a True Ancestor aura was revealed.

In an instant, a finger came across the void and directly crushed his True Ancestor's body, and his divine soul was completely shattered, falling on the spot.

A top-notch True Ancestor was directly killed in seconds!

This battle also stunned many people, after all, that top true ancestor is not weak, if the true ancestor who can kill a heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor is placed on the first ladder, then the true ancestor who can barely compete with an ordinary First Heavenly Dao Ancestor can be regarded as the second rank, but the top true ancestor just now can be regarded as the third rank, which is definitely not weak.

But such a top-notch True Ancestor was killed in seconds, which is enough to prove that the True Ancestor who shot is definitely a first-tier powerhouse!

All of a sudden, many True Ancestors kept a low profile, and without knowing the information, they no longer broke into those ruins.

Ye Tian's half-step True Ancestors didn't have time to pay attention to the battle between the True Ancestors, they were still trying to impact the True Ancestor realm.

Half a month has passed.

On this day, a half-step True Ancestor successfully rushed to the True Ancestor realm and became the first newly born True Ancestor in the Ancient Realm.

However, the True Ancestor was disappointed and he did not enter the record.

"Not on the record?"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised, but soon had a guess.

"It should be because the Xuanxu Ancient Realm itself has a True Ancestor, so breaking through the True Ancestor is not a manufacturing record. "

Ye Tian guessed.

This can also prove that it is not so easy to create a record, otherwise the ancient realm record would not be a real big opportunity.

But soon, everyone was dumbfounded.

Airplanes!!!!!

The Xuanxu list shone brightly, and a name appeared on it.

Ancient Realm Records - Refining Records: Shao Yuan (Yuan Refining True Ancestor) created Dao-level alchemy techniques and created a Xuanxu Ancient Realm Record.

Yuan Lian True Ancestor?

Many people are curious about who this person is.

After some calculations by the True Ancestor, he finally knew the identity of the True Ancestor of Yuan Lian.

One of the true legends of the Upper Triple Heaven Wind Cloud Sect Refining Weapon Peak!

Then, a record of the ancient realm was born, but it was basically created by the true ancestors of those forces in the domain realm, which made the major forces suffer a blow.

"It seems that the forces of these domain realms are very familiar with the ancient realm, and they also know the records of the ancient realm, so they have created records one by one in a short period of time, but if you want to break their records to their original extent, I'm afraid it will be very difficult!" Ye Tian muttered.

Ye Tian took a closer look, and the records created by these True Ancestors included all aspects, involving almost every aspect of cultivation.

Among them, the True Ancestor actually created a Dao technique, which is very powerful.

But Ye Tian didn't believe that the other party had created the Dao Technique in an instant, it must be that this Dao Technique could almost be created, and as soon as the Ancient Realm was born, he would immediately complete the last step.

This also illustrates a problem!

Those Upper Triple Heavens are probably connected with each other, and they have already planned to create the Ancient Realm, otherwise it would be impossible to prepare so much, and they would not have created so many Ancient Realm records at once, this must be a plan prepared in advance.

Ye Tian looked at those alchemy records, refining records, and spell records...... There is no hope of breaking in his heart, it's not that he has bad talent, but that this thing needs to be studied for a long time, and it's not that talent is good.

There are also speed records, defense records, attack records, and so on, but these are all records that require the most top-notch True Ancestors to break.

"It seems that I won't be able to break a record in a short period of time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he stopped thinking about these things, and felt at ease to impact the True Ancestor realm, striving to complete the transformation as soon as possible and become a true True Ancestor.

Another month passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's transformation finally came to an end.

He became a true True Ancestor!

At this time, a name appeared on the Xuanxu list-

Ancient Realm Record: Ye Tian, create the strongest new true ancestor record in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

Ancient Realm Record: Ye Tian, create a record of the strongest True Ancestor power in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

Ancient Realm Record: Ye Tian, create the strongest talent record in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

There are three talents in total, which simply breaks people's perceptions.

The records of the Ancient Realm only include the records of the True Ancestor, so after Ye Tian becomes the True Ancestor, there will be a record, otherwise his strongest talent record would have already been on the Xuanxu List when he was a half-step True Ancestor.

With the three major records in his body, Ye Tian felt very obviously.

The blessing of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has come!

At this moment, Ye Tian obviously felt that his comprehension had been increased by a very exaggerated amount, although it was not as good as the effect of taking the Heavenly Soul Pill, but at least it had one-tenth of the effect of the Heavenly Soul Pill.

What is this concept?

This is equivalent to Ye Tian knocking on a treasure equivalent to one-tenth of the effect of the Heavenly Soul Pill all the time, and it has been continuously effective, which is even more awesome than the Heavenly Soul Pill!

It can even be said that as long as no one breaks Ye Tian's records, his three records will always exist and increase him.

At this time, Ye Tian finally understood what an important opportunity the Ancient Realm Record was.

"Those Dao Ancestors are probably underestimating the Ancient Realm, in terms of value, an Ancient Realm is probably far above the Dao Realm! No wonder, those Upper Triple Heaven forces spent a huge price to forcibly turn the Quasi-Dao Realm into the Ancient Realm!" Ye Tianming realized.

At this time, Ye Tian picked up the records of the three ancient realms, which caused a huge sensation in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.
